title: Where is Kaworus core
wikitext:
[]: Where is Kaworu's core?             Quote Post by Titanium » Wed Nov 09, 2011 2:47 am I've noticed all the angels tend to have their blood ball showing, with the exception of the angel in the 13th episode. So... Where is Kaworu's? Thoughts? Also, how is Rei related to Kaworu?

[]:             Quote Post by symbv » Wed Nov 09, 2011 2:52 am What is "blood ball"? The core?

[]:             Quote Post by AngelNo13Bardiel » Wed Nov 09, 2011 3:02 am I'd suspect where the heart would be on anyone else, or maybe somewhere mid-torso (right below the sternum, by my reckoning). At least, that's where I put it the one time that issue came up.

[]: Re: Where is Kaworu's blood ball thing?             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Nov 09, 2011 3:05 am Titanium wrote: So... Where is Kaworu's? Thoughts?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Nov 09, 2011 3:07 am A couple of threads that go into Kaworu's core, a quick use of search function: http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/3734/Angels-Cores/ http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/6135/Did-Tabris-have-a-core/

[]:             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Wed Nov 09, 2011 8:39 pm I think his core is behind his eyes, explaining their colour.

[]:             Quote Post by Trajan » Wed Nov 09, 2011 8:44 pm TehDonutKing wrote: I think his core is behind his eyes, explaining their colour.

[]:             Quote Post by Kerath » Wed Nov 09, 2011 8:46 pm I think his eyes were red to show that he is a clone with some sort of albinism.

[]:             Quote Post by The Abhorrent » Wed Nov 09, 2011 11:28 pm Well, the cores tend to be rather spherical in shape. The implications should be obvious. Also, does that mean Tabris has more than one core? .... Sorry, couldn't resist.

[]:             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Wed Nov 09, 2011 11:42 pm The Abhorrent wrote: Well, the cores tend to be rather spherical in shape. The implications should be obvious. Also, does that mean Tabris has more than one core? .... Sorry, couldn't resist.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Thu Nov 10, 2011 12:02 am His balls. EDIT: damn, someone beat me to it...

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Thu Nov 10, 2011 1:14 am The Abhorrent wrote: Also, does that mean Tabris has more than one core?

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Thu Nov 10, 2011 4:24 am BrikHaus wrote: His balls.
